import json,os,datetime,collections
p='data/intel/iocs.json'
with open(p) as f:
    data=json.load(f)
print('mtime', datetime.datetime.fromtimestamp(os.path.getmtime(p)).isoformat())
print('type', type(data).__name__)
if isinstance(data, dict):
    print('keys', list(data)[:20])
    items = data.get('iocs') or data.get('items') or data.get('data') or []
else:
    items=data
print('items', len(items))
# inspect first 3
for item in items[:3]:
    print(item)
PY

from pathlib import Path
p = Path('/Users/chrixchange/.openclaw/cron/jobs.json')
obj = json.loads(p.read_text())
for j in obj.get('jobs', []):
    if j.get('name') == 'secopsai-status-summary':
        payload = j.setdefault('payload', {})
        msg = payload.get('message', '')
        msg = msg.replace('WhatsApp-style summary', 'Telegram-style summary')
        payload['message'] = msg
p.write_text(json.dumps(obj, indent=2) + '\n')
print('updated cron wording')
PY
